events.name: Mariano's 30th / Chicago
events.context: Mariano's 30th birthday celebration in Chicago. Plan includes 1-2 night backpacking trip beforehand (warm location, mid-March), then flights to Chicago for the main event.
events.hook: Find warm backpacking destination and book flights; arrange REI gear rentals; consider gift for Mariano.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana covering Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Planning activities and shopping for 4 pairs of eyeglasses.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto; validate insurance/prescription requirements; finalize activity plans for Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
